hooks.command: input=$(cat); [ "$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = "true" ] && exit 0; [ -z "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && exit 0; jq -nc '{decision:"block",reason:"This session changed files. If you finished a meaningful task and have not already, consider running /retro to capture a short 4-Ls reflection in retros/inbox/ for the weekly facilitator. If nothing was notable or you already did, reply in one line and end your turn."}'

jq -c 'if (.tool_name == "mcp__github__merge_pull_request") or (.tool_name == "mcp__github__update_pull_request" and .tool_input.state == "closed") then {hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "ask", permissionDecisionReason: "Closing or merging a PR is irreversible and outward-facing. Confirm this was explicitly requested and is not a batched or speculative action."}} else empty end'
